text: Hi! How can I help you manage your home maintenance tasks?
What do you recommend I track?
I have something specific in mind.
Great! What task would you like to track?
Sounds good, I've provided some options below. What task would you like to track?

Great idea!
Typically this activity occurs every 3 months. Would you like to set up a reminder for every 3 months?
Yes
No
Change time interval

Got it, I’ve added the 3 month reminder to this activity.
Would you like to add a custom note to this activity?

Got it.
Would you like to add a custom note to this activity?
Yes
No
Great. What note would you like to add?

Sounds good, I’ve added your note to this activity.
Would you like to also add an early reminder 1 week before the task?
Yes
No
Okay, your activity should be all set up now! If you are finished setting up tasks, you can safely close this window to return to your dashboard.
